component.name: GIF Editor
component.summary: Edit GIFs, videos, and images with layers, text, and animation

description.p: A desktop application for editing GIFs, MP4s, WebMs, and static images. Add image, text, and lens-flare overlay layers with affine transforms (scale, skew, rotation), keyframe animation, and per-frame positioning. Delete and restore frames, undo and redo edits, and export to GIF, MP4, or WebM with audio preservation, or to PNG, JPEG, or WebP stills.
